note: i.MX8 UX orchestrator. Central object class UXService (vtable 0x1fae00, typeinfo 0x1fad88). 6-state strategy machine (standby/operational/charging/alarm/maintenance/updating + shipping). Stripped; mapped via common_logf(0x1a9590) per-module source-path arg. See main/docs/ux.md.
